query: SELECT id, name, status, errorMessage, DATE_FORMAT(createdAt, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') as created, DATE_FORMAT(updatedAt, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') as updated FROM labSimulations ORDER BY updatedAt DESC LIMIT 5;
